userStories.title: Add Regression Test for Session Cookie Consistency
userStories.description: Create an automated test that verifies all files use the SESSION_COOKIE_NAME constant instead of hardcoded strings
acceptanceCriteria: Test file tests/e2e/session-cookie-consistency.test.ts created
Test scans src/app/api/auth/ for hardcoded 'session' or 'phraser_session' strings
Test verifies all cookie references use the imported constant
Test fails if any file hardcodes the cookie name
Test passes with npx vitest run tests/e2e/session-cookie-consistency.test.ts
userStories.notes: Phase 1: Quick Wins - prevents BUG-006 from recurring

userStories.title: Add CI Check for Cookie Name Consistency
userStories.description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs the cookie consistency test on every PR
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow file .github/workflows/check-cookie-consistency.yml created
Runs on pull_request events targeting main branch
Uses existing vitest test from CHORE-006-1
Fails the build if cookie name inconsistency detected
Runs in parallel with existing CI checks
userStories.notes: Phase 1: Quick Wins - depends on CHORE-006-1

userStories.title: Update Lessons Learned Document
userStories.description: Add a new section to docs/lessons-from-adrs-2026-02-11.md documenting the email/auth bug cluster
acceptanceCriteria: New section titled '10. HTTP APIs Over SMTP for Transactional Emails' added
Pattern, Evidence, Lesson, and Best Practice subsections included
References to BUG-004, BUG-005, BUG-006, and ADR-046 included
Code example showing lazy initialization pattern from resend-best-practices.md

userStories.title: Document Rate Limiting Management
userStories.description: Add a section to docs/resend-best-practices.md documenting how to manage rate limits during testing/development
acceptanceCriteria: New section '## Rate Limiting Management' added to resend-best-practices.md
Documents the 3 codes per hour rate limit
Includes commands to check current rate limit status
Includes commands to clear rate limit (delete old temp passwords)
Documents when rate limiting resets

userStories.title: Implement Option Combinators Pattern in AuthService
userStories.description: Replace imperative if statements with functional Option/Result combinators across AuthService
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/fp/option.ts has filter, unwrapOrElse, orElse methods
src/lib/fp/result.ts has recoverWith, orElse methods for fallback chains
src/lib/services/auth-service.ts uses Option combinators instead of nested if statements
src/lib/auth.ts uses Option combinators for session cookie handling
All auth methods use pipe() for composition
Pattern documented in docs/fp-patterns.md as standard for codebase
Tests pass: npx vitest run tests/unit/auth-service.test.ts
userStories.notes: Phase 3: FP Patterns Foundation - no dependencies

userStories.title: Implement Error Visibility for Coding Agents
userStories.description: Add structured error codes and documentation to make errors more discoverable and traceable for coding agents
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/fp/error-codes.ts created with typed error code registry
Error codes follow naming convention: {MODULE}_{NUMBER} (e.g., AUTH_001, DB_002)
src/lib/fp/errors.ts updated with code, cause, timestamp, and docs fields
docs/error-catalog.md created with error code documentation
Each error code documented with: kind, message, causes, fix, example code
AuthErrors typed factory object created in auth-service.ts
JSDoc @throws annotations added to public auth methods
Agent can search error code and find definition, docs, and all usages
userStories.notes: Phase 4: Error System - depends on CHORE-006-5

userStories.title: Unify Error Handling Systems
userStories.description: Consolidate ErrorHandler, NetworkErrorHandler, and AppError into a single unified error handling system using the error codes from CHORE-006-6
acceptanceCriteria: AppError interface extended with userMessage, retryable, cause fields
src/lib/app-error-handler.ts created as unified handler
Unified handler provides: logError(), toUserMessage(), toResponse(), fromUnknown()
src/lib/errorHandler.ts marked deprecated with JSDoc @deprecated
src/lib/networkErrorHandler.ts marked deprecated with JSDoc @deprecated
Client components updated to use AppErrorHandler instead of ErrorHandler
API routes use unified errorResponse() with error codes
All error logging uses structured JSON format with error codes
Tests pass: npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__/errorHandler.test.ts
userStories.notes: Phase 4: Error System - depends on CHORE-006-5, CHORE-006-6

userStories.title: Create E2E Production Login Test (Optional)
userStories.description: Create a Playwright test that logs into production, waits for manual code input, and verifies successful redirect to translate page
acceptanceCriteria: Test file tests/e2e/production-login.test.ts created
Test navigates to production login page
Test enters email address from environment variable
Test waits for user to provide the received code via stdin/prompt
Test enters the code and verifies redirect to /translate page
Test verifies session cookie is set correctly
Test uses Playwright's interactive pause or similar mechanism
Test marked with @manual or similar annotation for CI skip
Documentation in test file explains how to run manually
userStories.notes: Phase 5: Optional - not required for chore completion
